id.description: Unique identifier used in CLI commands

path.description: Absolute or ~ path to the project root (required for codebase scans and fix loop)

install.description: Command to install/sync dependencies before running the fix loop

check.description: Command to run linters/type checkers before running the fix loop

test.description: Command to run the test suite

type.description: Path to the prompt file under prompts/scan/sources/, e.g. logs/error-spikes or codebase/dead-code

normal.description: What healthy baseline looks like — helps the agent ignore noise

flag.description: Conditions or patterns that should become issues

ignore.description: Known noise patterns to skip — can be empty

source.description: Log data source — required for logs/* scan types

dataset.description: Dataset or log group name — required for logs/* scan types

token.description: Env var reference e.g. ${AXIOM_TOKEN} — required for logs/* scan types
